caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card featuring Steven Adams, who is depicted in a white basketball jersey. The card is part of the "OBSIDIAN" series and includes a blue fabric swatch and a signature. In the background, a man wearing a black shirt sits in a room with equipment, visible in a small inset screen. The setting includes a red and white background with the logo "JASPY'S" and the URL "CASEBREAKS.COM" printed prominently. As the sequence progresses, the person shifts their grip slightly, moving the card within their fingers. The composition remains consistent across the frames, focusing on the details of the collectible card while the background elements and the person in the inset video remain stationary. The card clearly displays the text "STEVEN ADAMS" and "CENTER" at the bottom.
